programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody has trouble with the love scenes for his first starring role and the guys have a beard-growing competition.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's parents set him up on a blind date, but just when he discovers he can talk to her, she shows interest in Sheldon.

programme.title: Home Alone
programme.desc: Eight-year-old Kevin McCallister makes the most of the situation after his family unwittingly leaves him behind when they go on Christmas vacation. When thieves try to break into his home, he puts up a fight like no other.

programme.title: Clarkson's Farm
programme.desc: Jeremy's restaurant idea is re-born, and there's not a moment to waste.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers come together for one last time, to confront their rivals and discover what they've been paid. And things get heated when it's time to count up the cash.
